name_en: [Size Change Chip Version] Model: M46922. Nicolas Ghesquière draws inspiration from the Alma BB bag, featuring new Monogram Dune canvas in delicate dune tones to make a bold statement. Semi-worn calfskin trim adds a modern touch to the classic silhouette. 23.5 x 17.5 x 11.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
